commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh The diseased have you not strengthened, neither have you healed those who were sick, neither have you bound up those who were broken, neither have you brought again those who were driven away, neither have you sought those who were lost; but with force and with cruelty have you ruled them. God alone can restore to life. But pastors will not be excused by ignorance if they know not the maladies and the remedies of their flock. This was blamed in the Pharisees, and is contrary to the spirit of the gospel, Matthew xxiii. , and 1 Peter v.
